recommended.song_name: Honey This Mirror Isnt Big Enough For The Two Of Us

content:
---------------------------------
| Artist   : Real McCoy           |
| Title    : Another Night        |
| Album    : Another Night        |
|                                 |
| Tabbed By: dustin7up            |
[tab]| Tuning   : Normal {[ch]E[/ch],[ch]A[/ch],[ch]D[/ch],[ch]G[/ch],[ch]B[/ch],[ch]E[/ch]} |
 ---------------------------------[/tab]

Chords:
[ch]Am[/ch]=x02210
[ch]Dm[/ch]=x00231
[ch]G[/ch] =320033
[ch]C[/ch] =x32010



{INTRO} [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] (x4)


{CHORUS}
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Another night, another dream, but always you,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Its like a vision of love that seems to be true,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Another night another dream, but always you,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
In the night I dream of love so true.[/tab]


{REPEAT INTRO}


{VERSE 1}
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Just another night, another vision of love,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
You feel joy, you feel pain, cuz nothing will be the same.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Just another night, is all that it takes,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
To understand, the difference between lovers and fakes.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
So baby, I talk talk, I talk to you,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
In the night in your dream, of love so true.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I talk talk, I talk to you,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
In the night in your dream, of love so true.[/tab]


{PRE-CHORUS}
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
In the night, in my dreams,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Im in love with you,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Cuz you talk to me like lovers do.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I feel joy I feel pain, cuz its still the same.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
When the night is gone, I'll be alone.[/tab]


{REPEAT CHORUS}


{REPEAT INTRO}


{VERSE 2}
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Just another night, another dream, another vision,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
Of love, with me,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Im here to set you free.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
I am your lover, your brother,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]     
Hey sister let me cover,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Your body with my love is with my lovin' just another.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Vision of love, that seems to be true,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
All we do all the things that only lovers do.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Vision of love, that seems to be true,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
All we do all the things that only lovers do.[/tab]


{REPEAT PRE-CHORUS}


{REPEAT CHORUS}


{BRIDGE}
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I talk talk, I talk to you,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
In the night, in your dream, of love so true.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I talk talk, I talk to you,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
In the night, in your dream, of love so true.[/tab]
